segments.text: KO is tough, but yeah, once you get to 78...
segments.original_text: 撃墜難しいけど、うん、78までくれば

segments.text: From jab you've got grabs and such, and from jab to forward smash you start seeing KO opportunities...
segments.original_text: 弱からのマベであったりとか、弱からの横スマッシュで撃墜見えてきますよ

full_text: KO is tough, but yeah, once you get to 78... From jab you've got grabs and such, and from jab to forward smash you start seeing KO opportunities...
